ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the trip */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., B for booking, C for customer) */,
  "origin_call" INTEGER /* ID of the caller */,
  "origin_stand" INTEGER /* ID of the origin stand */,
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxi */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip started */,
  "day_type" INTEGER /* Type of day (e.g., 0 for weekday, 1 for weekend) */,
  "missing_data" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if there is missing data in the trip */,
  "polyline" TEXT /* List of coordinates for the trip route */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* List of latitude coordinates for the trip route */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* List of longitude coordinates for the trip route */,
  "coord_features" TEXT /* Additional features related to the coordinates */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6, where 0 is Monday and 6 is Sunday) */,
  "quarter_hour" INTEGER /* Quarter hour of the day (0-95, where 0 is 00:00-00:14 and 95 is 23:45-23:59) */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week of the year (1-52) */,
  "trip_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the trip */,
  "trip_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the trip */,
  "fare_amount" TEXT /* Fare amount for the trip */,
  "tip_amount" TEXT /* Tip amount for the trip */,
  "toll_amount" TEXT /* Toll amount for the trip */,
  "extra_fees" TEXT /* Extra fees for the trip */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., completed, cancelled, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_taxi_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxi_id") REFERENCES taxis ("taxi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxis" (
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the taxi */,
  "taxi_model" TEXT /* Model of the taxi */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the taxi */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the taxi */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the taxi (e.g., available, in service, out of service) */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service or maintenance */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Total mileage of the taxi */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the taxi */,
  "last_trip_id" TEXT /* ID of the last trip completed by the taxi */,
  "last_trip_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the last trip ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxis_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, operations manager, executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trip request */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* ID of the trip associated with the request */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Location of the pickup */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Location of the dropoff */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_requests_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the update */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* ID of the trip associated with the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status change, location update) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_updates_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
